title: Ubiquiti UVC-AI-LPR-B, AI camera with License Plate Recognition
description: The new AI camera from Ubiquiti specializes in license plate recognition (LPR) on vehicles moving up to 90 km/h . The camera features a 1/1.8'' sensor with a resolution of 8MP (4K 3840 x 2160), a 3x optical zoom, and IR illumination up to a distance of 15m. The lens focal length of 4.1-12.3mm provides a viewing angle of 35°-109.9°. The camera is equipped with a 1x Gigabit port with PoE-IN PoE+ 802.3at . The maximum power consumption of the camera is 25.5W. The housing of cmaera has IP66… 8MP 1/1.8'' sensor with 4K 3840x2160 resolution at 30fps 3x optical zoom IR illumination up to 15m LPR - license plate recognition for vehicles moving up to 90km/h IP66-rated with IK04 impact resistance Camera Mounting bracket Waterproof gland Hose clamp Screws and wall plugs
